name: Vanguard's Visage (Rehearsal)
description: Notes In comparison to the original Vanguard’s Visage the damage value is lowered from 150 to 100, but equip stats remain the same. Although it might still be a solid option for a helm, it’s rather difficult to obtain due to the limited availability of the Rehearsal Shatters. And thus this item will most likely stay a vanity item for a while.

stats.range: 4.5 (+0.1 per WIS over 30) Shot Range: 5.175 tiles

effects: On party: Berserk for 3 (+0.1 per WIS over 30) seconds Eternal Defender: Fires a sword of projectiles towards your cursor Shots hit multiple targets Ignores defense of target Shots pass through obstacles
